compiled_state.title: [7eb8-af48] GREEN: Run final zero-occurrence verification across all story tests
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What to do
Run all three verification tests from S1-S3 and confirm zero unannotated plugins/dso references remain in the plugin tree.

## Verification steps

### Run S1 verification (comment refs)
bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-comment-refs.sh
Must exit 0.

### Run S2 verification (runtime refs)
bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-runtime-refs.sh
Must exit 0.

### Run S3 verification (markdown refs)
bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh
Must exit 0.

### Run hook tests
bash tests/hooks/test-plugin-self-ref-hook.sh
Must exit 0.

### Final grep audit
grep -rn "plugins/dso" plugins/dso/ | grep -v "plugin-self-ref-ok"
Must return zero lines.

## What counts as success
All 4 test files pass + grep audit returns empty.

## testing_mode: GREEN
